role: Special Assistant to the Supreme Leader (d. 8 March 2026)
bio: Mohammadreza Saqafifar served as a Special Assistant to Supreme Leader [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei), working out of the [Office of the Supreme Leader](/orgs/office-of-the-supreme-leader). He was killed on 8 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 8 March 2026. Special Assistant to Supreme Leader Khamenei.
